title: Who will shape the High Seas Treaty in the Mediterranean? [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As the High Seas Treaty enters implementation, Mediterranean countries face a strategic choice: shape the rules from the outset or remain on the sidelines. In a region defined by ecological interdependence and fragmented governance, participation in implementing the Treaty is a strategic necessity.
